titleStmt.title: SII 4.1013: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1013. (A.R. No. 188 of 1893). ON ANOTHER SLAB IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē rasanāganandagaṇitē kanyāṁ gatē bhāskarē dha¨rmmaprāptadhanā¨rcitā¨rtthiniva
haśśiṣṭeṣṭaciṁtāmaṇiḥ . Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamakhaṇḍava¨rttimanaghō bhīmēśvarāyādadāddīpaṁ dī
najanāśrayō dvijavaraḥ śrīcu¨rppunāmā budhaḥ . śakava [¨rṣa*] 986 svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya
śrīviṣṇuva¨rddhanamahārājula prava¨rddhamāna vijayarājyasaṁva 3 ṇḍagunēṁṭi kanyasaṁkrā
ṁti nimittamuna sthānapatulu nārudradēvara mudiseli suppunāyakuṇḍu śrībhīmēśvara
mahādēvaraku niccina Akhaṇḍava¨rtti lōhadiviya 1 dīniki nācaṁdrā¨rkkamu neyi sariyi
ṁccuvārugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēva rakilaramuna cāmiyabōyu veṁṭiyayu bā
diyabōyu doḍḍayayu nāviyabhōyu bhīmiyayu kommiyabōyu kāṭiya
yu berasina bōla vasumanaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 divasapaḍi vōyaṁggala tribhu
vanāṁkuśamuna nē mana 1 likhitaṁ peddanācā¨ryyaḥ . dēvadvijātyadhipariṣṭipa
vitradēhaḥ Ēkaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 4.1013 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
